title: Some users may see stale or delayed data in the Microsoft Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights
impact: Users may have seen stale or delayed data in the Microsoft Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights.

updates.content:
Title: Some users may see stale or delayed data in the Microsoft Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights

User impact: Users may see stale or delayed data in the Microsoft Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights.

Current status: Our monitoring systems have identified impact where some users may see stale or delayed data in the Microsoft 365 Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights. We’re reviewing service telemetry to isolate the source of the issue and determine appropriate remediation actions.
 
Scope of impact: Impact may occur for some users who access the Microsoft 365 Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights.
 
Next update by: Tuesday, April 7, 2026, at 8:30 PM UTC

Title: Some users may see stale or delayed data in the Microsoft Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights

User impact: Users may see stale or delayed data in the Microsoft Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights.

Current status: We’re continuing to assess service telemetry to isolate the source of this issue and determine appropriate remediation actions.
 
Scope of impact: Impact may occur for some users who access the Microsoft 365 Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights.
 
Next update by: Wednesday, April 8, 2026, at 12:30 AM UTC

Title: Some users may see stale or delayed data in the Microsoft Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights

User impact: Users may see stale or delayed data in the Microsoft Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights.

Current status: We determined that a dependency issue in the pipeline responsible for this function was resulting in this impact. While we were in the process of developing next steps, system monitoring indicated that the service had returned to normal health. The root cause has been addressed through our automated recovery systems, but the backlog of data needs to be processed in order to fully remediate this impact. Service health telemetry indicates that this backlog has been processed for 67 percent of users, and we anticipate that it will have completed processing for the remaining portion of affected users by our next scheduled update.

Scope of impact: Impact may occur for some users who access the Microsoft 365 Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights.

Start time: Monday, April 6, 2026, at 4:00 PM UTC

Root cause: A dependency issue in the pipeline responsible for this function was resulting in this impact.

Next update by: Wednesday, April 8, 2026, at 6:30 PM UTC

Title: Some users may see stale or delayed data in the Microsoft Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights

User impact: Users may see stale or delayed data in the Microsoft Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights.

Current status: We’re continuing to monitor service health telemetry, which indicates that backlog processing has reached approximately 99 percent completion. We’re monitoring the final stages of processing and verifying that user-facing data is fully updated to confirm remediation, and we expect this to complete by our next scheduled update.
 
Scope of impact: Impact may occur for some users who access the Microsoft 365 Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights.
 
Start time: Monday, April 6, 2026, at 4:00 PM UTC
 
Root cause: A dependency issue in the pipeline responsible for this function was resulting in this impact.
 
Next update by: Wednesday, April 8, 2026, at 10:30 PM UTC

Title: Some users may see stale or delayed data in the Microsoft Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights

User impact: Users may see stale or delayed data in the Microsoft Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights.

Current status: We're monitoring as the backlog processing job nears completion, and we've determined additional time is needed to fully update the user-facing data. We'll provide a revised timeline for resolution of impact as one becomes available.

Scope of impact: Impact may occur for some users who access the Microsoft 365 Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights.

Start time: Monday, April 6, 2026, at 4:00 PM UTC

Root cause: A dependency issue in the pipeline responsible for this function was resulting in this impact.

Next update by: Thursday, April 9, 2026, at 2:00 AM UTC

Title: Some users may see stale or delayed data in the Microsoft Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights

User impact: Users may have seen stale or delayed data in the Microsoft Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights.

Final status: Our operation to process the backlogged data is complete, and we've monitored our internal telemetry to confirm that the impact is remediated.

Scope of impact: Impact may have occurred for some users who accessed the Microsoft 365 Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights.

Start time: Monday, April 6, 2026, at 4:00 PM UTC

End time: Wednesday, April 8, 2026, at 10:50 PM UTC

Root cause: A dependency issue in the pipeline responsible for populating data in the Microsoft Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights resulted in impact.

Next steps:
- We're further reviewing the pipeline responsible for populating data in the Microsoft Copilot Dashboard to isolate what exactly caused the dependency issue to prevent similar impact scenarios from reoccurring.

This is the final update for the event.
